description:
Get 15% off Casetify using my link: http://casetify.com/breannaquan

Hello Friends!

bre in europe continues and this time we are in FRANCE 🇫🇷 it is my FIRST time in france (actually i went to Nice for a week before this but idk if im posting a vlog for that ... you will have to stay tuned) and i had such a fun time with my bestie @okay.ainsley we were truly biking all over paris without a strict itinerary. i had lots of yummy french food, went to the louvre, reveled at the eiffel tower many times, experienced the french bike culture and so much more 🚲

if you've read this far, let me know where you'd like to see me travel to next!! ❤️

love you x 1.23M,
bre
